testcase.name: test_get_lead_details
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_leads_routes_regression.py:222: in test_get_lead_details assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get lead details failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get lead details failed: 403 - {"detail":"Not authorized"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_lead_basic
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_leads_routes_regression.py:253: in test_update_lead_basic assert response.status_code == 200, f"Update lead failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Update lead failed: 403 - {"detail":"Not authorized"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_lead_stage_to_contacted
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_leads_routes_regression.py:267: in test_update_lead_stage_to_contacted assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stage update failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Stage update failed: 403 - {"detail":"Not authorized"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_stage_transition_to_site_visit_without_requirements

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid stage transition, got 403 assert 403 == 400 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_leads_routes_regression.py:636: in test_stage_transition_to_site_visit_without_requirements assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for invalid stage transition, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid stage transition, got 403 E assert 403 == 400 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
